gt_sql: SELECT SUM(T1.CommentCount) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie'
pred_sql:
SELECT SUM(p.CommentCount) 
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE TRIM(u.DisplayName) = 'csgillespie'
question: What is the total number of comments of all the posts owned by csgillespie?
